meta.programme: Can Farther Beat Closer? — Quantum Relaxation Ordering in Trapped-Ion Systems
meta.affiliation: Theory · Numerical · Experimental Quantum & Atomic Physics

stewards.name: Colla, Alessandra
stewards.role: Steward · open quantum systems theory · spin-boson dynamics

stewards.name: Warring, Ulrich
stewards.role: Steward · trapped-ion platform · experimental design · pre-registration

tracks.label: Theory
tracks.focus: Analytical and conceptual work on quantum relaxation ordering.
open_contributions: Necessary and sufficient conditions for the non-Markovian quantum Mpemba effect
Connection to Liouvillian exceptional points and non-Hermitian spectral structure
Links to shortcuts to adiabaticity and dissipative state engineering
Robustness analysis against decoherence channels beyond the baseline model
Extension to multi-qubit or multi-mode systems

tracks.label: Numerical
tracks.focus: Simulation pipeline, QuTiP toolbox, non-Markovian extensions.
open_contributions: Module 03: Bloch sphere scan for Mpemba manifold
Module 04: HEOM implementation for non-Markovian bath
Salvo's code integration for full spin-boson dynamics

tracks.label: Experimental
tracks.focus: Trapped-ion realisation, tomography, pre-registered measurement protocol.
open_contributions: Apparatus calibration for non-Markovian bath engineering
State tomography protocol design for trace-distance measurement
tracks.note: The 2016 archival dataset will be incorporated only after the analysis protocol is pre-registered. Experimental contributors are expected to participate in that process.

how_to_contribute: Read the Framework page first — especially the Measure Box and the Pre-registration Commitment.
Browse the Numerics toolbox and the scripts/ notebooks.
Contact one of the stewards by email to discuss scope before opening a pull request.
All contributions are CC BY 4.0 (text) / MIT (code) unless explicitly agreed otherwise.
